hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ -n "$f" && "$f" == *"/src/"* ]] && grep -qE '(anthropic|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|AI_DRAFTING)' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"This file touches the Anthropic/AI drafting integration. Use the /claude-api skill if modifying Anthropic SDK patterns."}}' || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Skills for this project: /claude-api (Anthropic SDK patterns), /schedule (set up cron/recurring agents), /loop (health polling and recurring monitoring on port 8080)."}}'
